## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
An office supplies business seeking a landing page that features customer testimonials or messages. The brand focuses on office products and aims to build trust

Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
